description: Make a golden algorithmic model - Use @doc/Petrović et al. - 2021 - Flexible 5G New Radio LDPC Encoder Optimized for High Hardware Usage Efficiency.pdf for the algorithm - Add the Compressed Sparse Row (CSR) novelty to the model - It does not need to be cycle accurate. It is only used to compare results of each step against RTL for correctness - Make sure the algorithm is correct
